_meta.headline_metric: cumulative_vol_avoided = running sum of (twin_realized_vol - path_realized_vol) per leg; a CONSTRUCTED risk-avoided measure in annualized vol points, NOT a return or dollar figure.
_meta.skill_metric: managed_minus_random_final = managed cumulative vol avoided minus random-trim cumulative vol avoided, per portfolio at the final leg. Isolates Lens's choice of WHICH position to cut from the mechanical cash-drag effect (both paths bank the same dollars into cash).
_meta.return_metric: Per-leg realized log return ln(V_end/V_start) on the SAME cash-inclusive value series as the vol, summed to a cumulative log return, shown as simple % = exp(sum)-1 (NOT annualized). 'return given up vs twin' = twin simple % minus path simple %; positive = return forfeited, negative = de-risking into cash improved return.
_meta.return_disclaimer: Return figures are for internal engineering evaluation only and must not be used in public-facing materials without separate review.
_meta.note: Point-in-time, no look-ahead. Managed applies only the single top-priority CTA per leg; random baseline trims the same dollars from a uniform-random held name on exactly those legs. Earnings/dividends neutralized.
